QuickWallTypeChange.Name: Ctrl-click wall type buttons to update selected walls
QuickWallTypeChange.Hint: When enabled, Ctrl-clicking Normal, Terrain, Invisible, Ethereal, Window, Door, or Secret Door in the Wall Controls changes the selected walls to that type.

DebugShapeSelection.Name: Debug Indy shape selection
DebugShapeSelection.Hint: When enabled, Ctrl-click shape selection diagnostics are written to the browser console.

PreviewWallColor.Name: Preview wall color
PreviewWallColor.Hint: Hex color for generated wall previews, for example #c10e56ff.

PreviewWallWidth.Name: Preview wall width
PreviewWallWidth.Hint: Line width for generated wall previews.

PreviewVertexColor.Name: Preview vertex color
PreviewVertexColor.Hint: Hex color for regular preview vertices.

PreviewVertexActiveColor.Name: Preview active vertex color
PreviewVertexActiveColor.Hint: Hex color for hovered or dragged rectangle split vertices.

PreviewVertexSize.Name: Preview vertex size
PreviewVertexSize.Hint: Size for regular preview vertices. Rectangle split vertices are drawn slightly larger.

PreviewEndpointColor.Name: Preview endpoint color
PreviewEndpointColor.Hint: Hex color for endpoint and rectangle corner handles.

PreviewEndpointSize.Name: Preview endpoint size
PreviewEndpointSize.Hint: Size for endpoint and rectangle corner handles.

PreviewHandleColor.Name: Preview Bezier handle color
PreviewHandleColor.Hint: Hex color for cubic Bezier control handles.

PreviewHandleSize.Name: Preview Bezier handle size
PreviewHandleSize.Hint: Size for cubic Bezier control handles.

PreviewOutlineColor.Name: Preview outline color
PreviewOutlineColor.Hint: Hex color for handle and vertex outlines.

PreviewOutlineWidth.Name: Preview outline width
PreviewOutlineWidth.Hint: Outline width for handles and vertices.

Tooltips.CubicBezier: Click-drag to place the curve, then drag the red endpoints or green handles. Use plus/minus or Ctrl-wheel to adjust segment count, Enter to create walls, or Escape to cancel.
Tooltips.Ellipse: Click-drag to place the ellipse, hold Alt for a circle, or hold Ctrl to grow from the center. Use plus/minus or Ctrl-wheel to adjust segment count, Enter to create walls, or Escape to cancel.
Tooltips.Rectangle: Click-drag to place the rectangle. Left-click a side to add a vertex, restore a gapped segment, or restore a removed side. Alt-click a segment to create a gap, Alt-click a vertex to remove it, drag vertices to reposition them, Enter creates walls, and Escape cancels.

Notifications.CubicWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} curved wall segment(s).
Notifications.EllipseWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} ellipse wall segment(s).
Notifications.RectangleWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} rectangle wall segment(s).
